template_data.quote_html:
You don't need to be large.
You need to be on the list.
template_data.image_headline: YOUR BIGGEST CUSTOMER HAS BEEN WAITING
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic story layout, cream background. Bold headline top in dark navy: 'YOUR BIGGEST CUSTOMER HAS BEEN WAITING'. Left side: illustrated professional in blazer, confident stance, holding a GSA contract folder. Right side: large bold '$700B' label in dark navy with accent highlight, three stacked 2-word labels below — 'ONE VEHICLE', 'EVERY AGENCY', 'OPEN NOW'. Bottom dark navy banner with short callout: 'GSA SCHEDULE'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
